_: Manifest for Gemini Nano Banana asset generation — ATT Investments × Enervit, MČR & MSR Silnice 2026 Jeseník. Each entry → public/assets/scenes/<category>/<id>.png. styleAnchor appended to every prompt.
styleAnchor: Flat vector illustration in the style of Martin Paseka and the @road__classics Instagram artwork: ATT Investments pro cycling team palette — deep navy blue (#00205b primary, #001230 darks, #002a6b mids, #1a4a9c highlights) with warm gold accents (#f1cc7e, #d4a84a) and cream highlights (#f0e4c8) for skin and props. Charming cozy character vignettes, rounded soft shapes, 3/4 isometric perspective, subtle dotted grid background texture, dark almost-black navy setting, dreamlike Jeseníky mountain mood at dusk — spruce forests, granite ridges, drifting mist. Cinematic composition, balanced negative space.
negativePrompt: no photorealism, no 3D rendering, no harsh shadows, no realistic skin tones, no bright green grass (use deep teal-navy ground), no bright daytime blue sky (use deep navy dusk sky), no text, no watermark, no logos.

assets.prompt: Aerial 3/4 view of Masaryk Square (Masarykovo náměstí) in Jeseník spa town at early morning, historic town hall tower and arcaded houses, a single warm street lamp glowing, two cyclists in racing kits walking with bikes across the cobblestones, the wooded Jeseníky mountains rising behind the rooftops, atmospheric mist between the spruce slopes

Top-down 3/4 view of a winding mountain road weaving out of the village of Lipová-lázně, timber spa cottages with steep roofs, spruce forest closing in on both sides, a small river running parallel to the road, foothills of the Jeseníky ridge on the horizon

Aerial 3/4 view of the small mountain saddle village of Ramzová nestled on a forested hillside, a chairlift line climbing the slope behind, tile-roofed chalets, a cycling road switchbacking up toward the pass in late afternoon golden light, soft atmospheric mood

Steep cycling climb up to the Ramzová mountain pass, narrow road winding up through dense spruce forest with granite boulders, a lonely solo cyclist in navy-and-gold ATT jersey leaning into the climb out of the saddle, valley far below

High exposed mountain-pass road at Červenohorské sedlo crossing an open ridge between rounded forested peaks, a peloton of 5 cyclists riding in a tight line, wind bending the mountain grasses, dramatic dusk sky over the Jeseníky

Dramatic mountain climb with the iconic Praděd transmitter tower rising on the highest peak of the Jeseníky in the distance, cycling road snaking up through alpine meadow and stunted spruce, a cyclist visible mid-climb, mist drifting across the summit

Triumphant finish on Masaryk Square in Jeseník at sunset, a cyclist with arms raised crossing a cream finish-line tape, historic town-hall tower and arcaded facades framing the road, crowd barriers and cheering fans lining the cobblestones, the dark Jeseníky mountains glowing behind

Decorative top-down illustrated map of the Jeseníky mountains race region, forested ridges and rounded peaks, Jeseník and Lipová-lázně marked as little towns, Ramzová as a stylized saddle pass, the Praděd tower as an icon on the highest peak, a dotted route path tracing the cycling course, compass rose, ornamental mountain border

Aerial 3/4 view of an individual time-trial start ramp in the town of Uničov at midday, a lone cyclist in aero tuck on a time-trial bike speeding along a flat closed road lined with crowd barriers and bunting, flat Haná farmland stretching away. Empty of other riders
A bunch of young junior cyclists in colourful national kits racing together on a rolling country road near Jeseník, forested hills behind, energetic youthful mood, dusk light. No text

Cozy mountain-cottage morning kitchen seen 3/4 from above, wooden table with three breakfast options laid out: scrambled eggs with bread, oatmeal porridge with fruit, and a buttery croissant with espresso. A navy-and-gold cycling jersey draped over a chair, sun streaming through curtains, ceramic plates. Inviting and warm

Home garage workshop seen 3/4, road bicycle on a maintenance stand, tire pump, chain lube, tools on a workbench, helmet hanging, soft morning light through the open garage door, a friendly dog watching from the corner

Top-down view of a flat-laid navy-blue and gold ATT cycling jersey with three back pockets clearly visible, beside it laid out: an Enervit Carbo Gel C2:1PRO sachet, an Enervit Carbo Bar C2:1PRO, an Enervit Isocarb C2:1PRO drink-mix sachet, energy chews. Clean composition, soft drop shadows

Top-down illustrated map of the Jeseníky foothills at dawn with a winding mountain road heading toward Jeseník, a small car icon with bicycles on the roof rack moving along the route, spruce forest patches, illustrated distance markers

Pre-race briefing scene on Masaryk Square in Jeseník, hundreds of cyclists in colourful jerseys gathered behind a start banner (no text), event flags fluttering, a dog mascot weaving among riders, historic town-hall tower in the background, sunrise breaking over the mountains

Side view sprite of a focused road cyclist in a navy-blue and gold ATT pro team racing jersey leaning into the bars in racing tuck position, aero helmet, sunglasses, white cycling shoes, transparent background, character design, no text

Top-down view of a single road cyclist as seen from directly above — navy-blue ATT jersey with a gold stripe, aero helmet (oval seen from top), two thin foreshortened wheel ovals, arms reaching forward to drop bars. Compact sprite-icon composition, slight 3/4 angle suggesting forward motion
assets.style: Clean character sprite illustration, single isolated subject ONLY, plain transparent or pure off-white background. No road, no scenery, no landscape, no other riders, no buildings. Cyclist viewed from a high REAR-three-quarter angle: camera positioned behind and above the rider, we see the BACK of the helmet and the back of the jersey, the rider is facing AWAY from the viewer riding INTO the scene up-the-frame. Rear wheel toward bottom of frame, front wheel further away at top of frame. The cyclist must be the entire focus, centered. Navy-blue and gold ATT team kit.

assets.prompt: A cyclist crouched on a mountain roadside with a flat front tire, holding a CO2 cartridge, spare inner tube on the ground, frustrated expression, spruce forest behind
Action shot of a cyclist mid-ride reaching out with their right hand to grab an Enervit gel from a feed-station volunteer, both blurring slightly with motion, illustrated style
A peloton breaking apart on a steep mountain climb, one cyclist in navy-and-gold ATT jersey out of the saddle attacking off the front, others straining behind, dramatic perspective
Local mountain fans cheering on a roadside, an old man in a flat cap ringing a cowbell, a child waving a small flag, a dog with a bandana, spruce forest behind
Cyclist crossing a finish-line tape on Masaryk Square in Jeseník at sunset, arms raised, peloton coming up behind, cream finish-line ribbon stretched across, historic town-hall tower framing the shot

Joyful post-race celebration on the podium at Jeseník town square at sunset. A group of cyclists in navy-and-gold ATT kit raising their arms in triumph holding bottles. A pale labrador with a team bandana sits among them. Sunset glow behind the town-hall tower. Festive triumphant mood, illustrated character vignette
A tall champagne flute filled with sparkling pale-gold prosecco, fine bubbles rising, gentle glow

assets.prompt: Cozy mountain-chalet common room at night seen 3/4 from a low angle — timber-beamed ceiling, a stone fireplace glowing, a long wooden table with candles, three or four cyclists in casual evening wear gathered around with drinks, a dog resting under the table

Cyclists relaxing under string lights on a mountain spa-town terrace at dusk — a small folk band on a tiny stage, accordion and guitar, forested ridges and chalet silhouettes in the distance, warm amber lantern glow, joyful relaxed mood

Close-up tabletop scene from above — five hands raising glasses in a toast, the glasses converging in the centre of the frame, warm candlelight, rustic wooden table, a navy team cap and a bidon on the side

End-of-day scene — a single cyclist sitting on a stone bench at a Jeseníky mountain overlook at midnight, a drink in hand, looking out over the dark forested ridges under a starry sky with the Milky Way faintly visible. Quiet, contemplative
